title: CustomJoinAndLeaveMessages
description: Create custom join and leave messages easily.
body:
[![AshCraft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a75887d69106ed9eb2dd595176121f279523f184_0.webp)](https://www.ashcraft.cz/)

The CustomJoinAndLeaveMessages plugin is a simple yet effective solution for customizing the join and leave messages displayed to players on a Minecraft server. By utilizing placeholders and color codes, server administrators can create unique messages to greet players when they join and provide a distinctive farewell when they leave. This plugin is particularly useful for personalizing the player experience, adding flair to community servers, and making announcements during events. [Here is a detailed description of its features and functionality.](https://ashsource.ashkiano.com/resource-detail/39)

Check out AshSource for more plugins and resources [ashsource.ashkiano.com](https://ashsource.ashkiano.com/)
